witnesses.description: Addition and multiplication tables for Z/4Z.
A two-element table with XOR-like addition and left-projection multiplication.

checks.claim: The listed Z/4Z addition and multiplication tables satisfy the finite ring axioms.
checks.notes: The validator checks additive abelian group structure, multiplication associativity, identity, and distributivity.

checks.claim: The listed nonzero residues are zero divisors in Z/4Z.
checks.notes: The validator checks both factors are nonzero and their product is the additive identity.

checks.claim: The listed two-operation table satisfies the distributive laws.
checks.notes: The validator enumerates all triples and confirms distributivity fails.
